hero.title: Reserve a Table at a Restaurant
hero.sub: Book a table easily and quickly online
hero.panel_sub: A cleaner way to find the right restaurant, reserve faster, and manage the full dining journey.
hero.feature1_desc: Search by city, cuisine, and vibe without noise.
hero.feature2_desc: Choose your place, time, and guests in a few clean steps.
hero.feature3_desc: Floor plans, staff tools, and reservations in one system.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Search by name, city, or cuisine type to find the perfect spot.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Choose the date, time, and number of guests for your visit.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Receive instant confirmation and enjoy your dining experience.

cta.owner_desc: Join SpotBook and manage reservations, staff, and floor plans from a single dashboard.

benefits.title: A sharper first impression for your guests
benefits.card1_desc: Find restaurants faster with cleaner filters and a more premium browsing experience.
benefits.card2_desc: Restaurants look richer, more visual, and easier to scan on desktop and mobile.
benefits.card3_desc: Stronger hierarchy and clearer actions guide guests toward booking with less friction.
